content:
# Chemical Analysis

**Summary**: The chemical characterization of fluids to determine mineral, ion, and organic content.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] used chemical-analysis to characterize the composition of produced water samples.

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] measured COD as a primary indicator of waste toxicity.

- [[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024]] used chemical-analysis to determine concentrations of HMs like As, Cd, and Pb in AC filters.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] measured COD as a primary indicator of waste toxicity.

- [[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024]] used chemical-analysis to determine concentrations of HMs like As, Cd, and Pb in AC filters.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Not stated in source ([[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]])

- Initial COD levels were approximately 2,500 mg/L before WAO and reduced to 57-67 mg/L after EO treatment. ([[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023, p. 81]])

- Concentrations for Cu, Zn, As, Cd, and Pb exceeded world crustal values across all studied cities. ([[2024-alenazi|Alenazi, 2024, p. 107]])
